creator: henrix@camandro.org
text:
(In reply to Oleksandr Kryvulia from comment #2)
>You can try latest CURRENT or disable hwpstate by setting hint.hwpstate_intel.0.disabled=1 in /boot/loader.conf
> See another bug #253288

Ah!  Awesome!  That you for your reply.  I'll read through that bug, it could definitely be it.  Disabling hwpstate doesn't sound great, but I'll need to go through all the comments.

I guess the fix for that bug is already in CURRENT?  I'm not really experienced in FreeBSD, so running CURRENT sounds scary for a laptop I want to be stable (it's been running OpenBSD for a long time).
